name: Roast Potatoes and Squash
recipeIngredient: 1 pound yellow-flesh potatoes, peeled and cut into 1-inch cubes
1 1/2 pounds winter squash (such as Hubbard or butternut), peeled and cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat the oven to 400 degrees. Soak the potatoes in cold water for 5 minutes to remove excess starch, then drain.
2 Spray a nonstick roasting pan with PAM. Place the potatoes and squash in one layer in the pan. Sprinkle with rosemary and season with salt and pepper. Roast for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally so that the vegetables cook evenly. Continue roasting until well browned, about 30 more minutes. Serve.
Makes: 4 servings.
